data.statement_mn:
Өгөгдсөн натурал тоо **n**-ийн хувьд дараах нийлбэрийг ол:

$$1! + 2! + 3! + \dots + n!$$

Энд $$k!$$ нь **k**-ийн факториал буюу $$1 \times 2 \times 3 \times \dots \times k$$ гэж тодорхойлогдоно.
data.statement_en:
Given a natural number **n**, compute the following sum:

$$1! + 2! + 3! + \dots + n!$$

Where $$k!$$ is the factorial of **k**, defined as $$1 \times 2 \times 3 \times \dots \times k$$.
data.input_format_en: A single line containing a natural number **n**.
data.output_format_en: Print a single line containing the sum $$1! + 2! + \dots + n!$$.
